case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY AM/PM BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY AM/PM BAIL BONDS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,583.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE FORFEITURE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT AM/PM BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE FORFEITURE, REINSTATE THE BAIL AND EXONERATE THE BOND FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 501, MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE FORFEITURE, CALENDAR OF FEB-27-1998, DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
ORDER DENYING MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, SET ASIDE FORFEITURE, REINSTATE THE BAIL AND EXONERATE THE BOND
REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY AM/PM BAIL BONDS
